# Siyundi Tech - High-Quality Krones & Sidel Spare Parts Global Supplier

## About Siyundi Tech
Siyundi Tech is a specialized manufacturer and global supplier of compatible spare parts for PET packaging machinery, focusing on leading brands such as Krones, Sidel, and KHS. We provide high-precision OEM replacement components with worldwide shipping capabilities.

## Core Products
- **Krones Spare Parts**: Gripper parts, conveyor components, filling valve seals.
- **Sidel Spare Parts**: Mandrel parts, gripper assembly, heating lamps.
- **KHS Spare Parts**: Filling valve components, vacuum pipes.
- **CNC Precision Parts**: Custom-machined OEM components based on technical drawings.

## Our Expertise
- 15+ years of precision manufacturing experience.
- Specialized in PET bottling and packaging industry.
- High-precision CNC machining (Aluminum, Stainless Steel, Engineering Plastics).
- Rapid global shipping and competitive pricing.
